description: Reality adjustment factors derived from Black-Scholes modeling and paper trading calibration
data_source: Initial estimates from measure_reality_framework.py (NOT yet calibrated with real paper trading)

spread_costs.comment: Bid/ask spread as percentage of mid price (measured at 16:00 ET)

slippage_pct.comment: Average slippage beyond mid price as percentage

pnl_adjustments.comment: Adjustment multipliers for backtest P&L assumptions by expiry type and ticker
pnl_adjustments.note: Backtest assumes +45% on wins. Reality = +45% * adjustment_factor - spread - slippage - commission

win_rate_adjustments.comment: Expected win rate degradation from backtest to reality

theta_decay_daily.comment: Daily theta decay as percentage of option value

recommendations.reason_avoid: Spread costs too high (10-15%), adjustment factors too low (0.09-0.24x)
